blended.narrative: Brundage Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,017 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
